headings.text: Supply Chain Responsibility and Sustainable Procurement

sections.heading: Corporate Social Responsibility of PCBWay
sections.text: Blog > Corporate Social Responsibility of PCBWay Corporate Social Responsibility of PCBWay by: PCBWay May 30,2025 16302 Views 0 Comments Posted in News PCBWay recognizes the significant role it plays within the supply chain and broader society, along with the potential impact of its operations. To this end, we have established and strictly enforce the following principles, which not only govern our own conduct but also set clear expectations for our partners. Our goal is to ensure full legal and regulatory compliance, promote long-term sustainability, and generate a positive impact on society. Human Rights and Labor Protection No employment of individuals below the legal working age; all fo...

sections.heading: Human Rights and Labor Protection
sections.text: PCBWay recognizes the significant role it plays within the supply chain and broader society, along with the potential impact of its operations. To this end, we have established and strictly enforce the following principles, which not only govern our own conduct but also set clear expectations for our partners. Our goal is to ensure full legal and regulatory compliance, promote long-term sustainability, and generate a positive impact on society. Human Rights and Labor Protection No employment of individuals below the legal working age; all forms of forced or bonded labor are strictly prohibited. Discrimination and harassment in the workplace are not tolerated; an inclusive work environment f...
